short_description: LIFE quote API timeout for new policy issuance
description: Users submitting new LIFE policy quotes are getting HTTP 504 from PolicyQuoteAPI. request_id: _91000123. quote_number: 81001234. application: LIFE. service_name: PolicyQuoteAPI. environment: PROD. Error ID: LIFE_QUOTE_504. Around 62% of requests are failing during agent-assisted quote creation.

First Notice of Loss submissions in the workers compensation portal are failing with HTTP 500 from ClaimSubmissionAPI. request_id: _91000124. quote_number: 81001235. application: WC. service_name: ClaimSubmissionAPI. environment: PROD. Error ID: WC_FNOL_500. Adjusters cannot submit new injury claims.

short_description: GL premium rating service showing database timeout
description: General liability premium recalculation is timing out after 18 seconds because RatingEngine is waiting on policy rating tables. request_id: _91000125. quote_number: 81001236. application: GL. service_name: RatingEngine. environment: UAT. Error ID: GL_RATE_DB_408. Reproducible for large commercial accounts.

short_description: PROP renewal batch deadlock during overnight run
description: Property renewal processing stalled during the overnight batch due to repeated SQL deadlock retries in RenewalBatchProcessor. request_id: _91000126. quote_number: 81001237. application: PROP. service_name: RenewalBatchProcessor. environment: PROD. Error ID: PROP_RENEWAL_DB_1213. About 4,200 renewals are delayed.

short_description: DENTAL eligibility API unauthorized after token rotation
description: Dental member eligibility checks started returning HTTP 401 after token rotation on EligibilityAPI. request_id: _91000127. quote_number: 81001238. application: DENTAL. service_name: EligibilityAPI. environment: PROD. Error ID: DENTAL_AUTH_401. Call center agents cannot confirm active coverage.

short_description: VISION document upload handshake failures in QA
description: Vision claims document uploads are failing TLS handshake validation when DocumentUploadService calls the downstream storage endpoint. request_id: _91000128. quote_number: 81001239. application: VISION. service_name: DocumentUploadService. environment: QA. Error ID: VISION_TLS_525. Issue affects claim image attachments in test cycles.

short_description: LIFE policy issuance duplicate requests after retry storm
description: Policy issuance is creating duplicate outbound requests after retry logic spikes in PolicyIssueAPI. request_id: _91000129. quote_number: 81001240. application: LIFE. service_name: PolicyIssueAPI. environment: PROD. Error ID: LIFE_ISSUE_RETRY_429. Agents report duplicate issuance attempts for high-value policies.

short_description: WC settlement ledger deadlock on claim payment posting
description: Claim settlement posting is intermittently failing because SettlementLedgerService is hitting database deadlocks during ledger updates. request_id: _91000130. quote_number: 81001241. application: WC. service_name: SettlementLedgerService. environment: PROD. Error ID: WC_LEDGER_1213. Finance users are retrying postings manually.
